mission.title: ollama: Ollama Windows version
mission.description: Ollama Windows version. Requested by 33+ users.

steps.title: Check current ollama setup
steps.description:
Verify your ollama version and configuration:
```bash
ollama --version
```
This feature requires a working ollama installation.

steps.title: Review ollama configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant ollama configuration:
I saw it is coming but didn't mention when? Would be great if you pinned this issue as more people use Windows & ollama has such a great dx.

The project looks absolutely brilliant. Would love to use text (gpt-4) & code (copilot) locally.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Ollama Windows version
steps.description:
Fix #403 
- Support cuda build in Windows
- Import "containerd/console" lib to support colorful output in Windows terminal
```yaml
scoop install go cmake gcc
set CGO_ENABLED="1"
git clone https://github.com/jmorganca/ollama.git
go generate ./...
go build .
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Ollama Windows version" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Fix #403 
- Support cuda build in Windows
- Import "containerd/console" lib to support colorful output in Windows terminal
codeSnippets:
scoop install go cmake gcc
set CGO_ENABLED="1"
git clone https://github.com/jmorganca/ollama.git

prerequisites.description: A working ollama installation or development environment.
